turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Design detailed learning course from scratch on “Financial Analyst”. Break this topic into several subtopics and list the skills required for each subtopic. Suggest top online courses from free platform for each sub topic. Use below points for designing course.

01 Course Title
02 Learning Objectives
03 Target Audience
04 Course Duration
05 Curriculum Map
06 Delivery Method
07 Course Content
08 Learning Materials

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
01 Course Title: Financial Analyst Masterclass

02 Learning Objectives:
- To introduce learners to the role and responsibilities of a financial analyst
- To teach learners how to perform financial analysis and interpret data
- To provide learners with an understanding of financial statements and financial ratios
- To teach learners how to evaluate investments and make recommendations
- To provide learners with an understanding of risk management and portfolio optimization

03 Target Audience: 
- Anyone interested in pursuing a career as a financial analyst
- Fresh finance graduates seeking a comprehensive understanding of financial analysis
- Business owners and managers who wish to improve their financial analysis skills
- Investors who wish to evaluate investment opportunities better

04 Course Duration: 10 weeks (2 hours per week)

05 Curriculum Map:
Week 1: Introduction to Financial Analysis
- Understanding the role of a financial analyst 
- Types of financial analysis (quantitative and qualitative)
- Setting financial goals

Week 2: Financial Statements and Analysis
- Understanding balance sheets and income statements
- Ratio analysis
- Analyzing trends

Week 3: Forecasting and Budgeting
- Forecasting techniques (Trend, Regression, and Time-Series Analysis)
- Developing a budget
- Capital budgeting

Week 4: Time Value of Money and Discounted Cash Flow
- Understanding the time value of money
- Discounted cash flow analysis
- Present value and future value

Week 5: Understanding Risk and Return
- Absolute and relative risk 
- Measuring return 
- Portfolio analysis

Week 6: Market Analysis 
- Industry analysis 
- Competitive positioning 
- Market share analysis

Week 7: Equity Analysis
- Understanding the stock market 
- Valuation methods (Dividend Discount Model, Price/Earnings Ratio, Discounted Cash Flow)
- Fundamental Analysis via financial statements

Week 8: Fixed Income Analysis
- Understanding the bond market 
- Bond valuation (present value, yield to maturity)
- Yield curve and interest rate analysis

Week 9: Derivatives
- Forward contracts 
- Options 
- Futures

Week 10: International Finance
- Understanding the foreign exchange market 
- Exchange rate regimes 
- Managing currency risk

06 Delivery Method: Online Learning 
- Videos, lectures and other interactive content to cover theoretical concepts
- Case studies and real-life examples of financial analysis
- Interactive exercises and quizzes to evaluate the understanding of students

07 Course Content: 
- Video lectures
- Reading materials
- Case studies 
- Interactive exercises and quizzes 

08 Learning Materials:
- Financial Statement Analysis by Martin Fridson and Fernando Alvarez
- The Analysis and Use of Financial Statements by Gerald I. White, Ashwinpaul C. Sondhi and <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>
- Financial Modeling and Valuation: A Practical Guide to Investment Banking and Private Equity by Paul Pignataro

Top Free Online Courses: 
- Introduction to Financial Analysis by Michigan State University on Coursera
- Financial Analysis Learning - Advanced Level by Udemy
- Financial Markets by Yale University on Coursera
- Financial Management by Khan Academy
